title: Naming of gymnasium at Monterey High School
doc_html:
§85.1. Naming of gymnasium at Monterey High School

            The Concordia Parish School Board may name the new gymnasium at Monterey High School in honor of Jack Bairnsfather.

            Acts 2022, No. 594, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.
doc_text:
§85.1.  Naming of gymnasium at Monterey High School
The Concordia Parish School Board may name the new gymnasium at Monterey High
School in honor of Jack Bairnsfather.
Acts 2022, No. 594, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.
